REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED IN PART. PETITIONER IS AWARDED ATTORNEY FEES OF $15,498, PARALEGAL FEES OF $225, AND COSTS OF $1,280.14. THE ATTORNEY FEES ARE CALCULATED AT THE REASONABLE HOURLY RATE OF $410 MULTIPLIED BY THE REASONABLE NUMBER OF HOURS OF 37.8. THE REASONABLE NUMBER OF HOURS IS DETERMINED TO BE: 8 HOURS FOR THE WORK PERFORMED FROM FEBRUARY 1 - MARCH 6, 2023; 8 HOURS FOR THE WORK PERFORMED FROM MARCH 23-30, 2023; 4.8H OURS FOR THE WORK PERFORMED APRIL 3 AND 4, 2023; 5 HOURS FOR THE WORK PERFORMED APRIL 6-18; AND 12 HOURS FOR THE WORK PERFORMED MAY 23, 2023, TO THE PRESENT. JUDGE: HAROLD L. KAHN ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONER'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. THE ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONFIRMED AND SHALL BE THE FINAL JUDGMENT OF THE COURT. PETITIONER'S REQUEST TO INCLUDE STATUTORY INTEREST ON ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS IS DENIED. STATUTORY INTEREST WAS NOT PART OF THE ARBITRATOR'S AWARD. THE COURT MUST CONFIRM THE AWARD "AS MADE," (CCP 1286), AND ENTER JUDGMENT IN CONFORMITY THEREWITH. (CCP 1287.4.) PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER AND PROPOSED JUDGMENT. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Jul-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED. The arbitration award is confirmed and shall be the final judgment of the Court. Petitioner's request to include statutory interest on attorney's fees and costs is denied. Statutory interest was not part of the Arbitrator's award. The Court must confirm the award "as made," (CCP 1286), and enter judgment in conformity therewith. (CCP 1287.4.) Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order and proposed judgment. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jul-12-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Adrian Gerard Driscoll 415-788-1900 of Murphy, Pearson, Bradley & Feeney appearing for Petitioner.
Albert Flor 510-834-6600 of Wendel, Rosen, Black & Dean, LLP appearing via Zoom for Respondent.

Discussed. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER JOANNA PFEISTER Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney Fees And Costs

is granted in part. Petitioner is awarded attorney fees of $15,498, paralegal fees of $225, and costs of $1,280.14. The attorney fees are calculated at the reasonable hourly rate of $410 multiplied by the reasonable number of hours of 37.8. The reasonable number of hours is determined to be: 8 hours for the work performed from February 1 - March 6, 2023; 8 hours for the work performed from March 23-30, 2023; 4.8h ours for the work performed April 3 and 4, 2023; 5 hours for the work performed April 6-18; and 12 hours for the work performed May 23, 2023, to the present.

Judge: Harold L. Kahn ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorney Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jun-15-2023 Continued To Jul-12-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration (Notices)
Off Calendar Apr-11-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER JOANNA PFEISTER Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration (Notices)is GRANTED. The dispute as framed by the petition, paragraph 3, shall proceed in arbitration per section 12.6(C) of the CC&Rs. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Tauala ; Not Reported. (D501)
